description: Composition Purple top made of 100% viscose, has a V-neck with printed frills falling over the neckline and extending till the back, and short sleeves Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this fashionable top from jealous 21. The collar shawl drapes across your shoulders enhancing the femininity of this top, while the the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and heeled sandals for that uber cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8'', Chest-33”
